title: North Korea-Nexus Threat Actor Compromises Widely Used Axios NPM Package in Supp

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 - North Korea-Nexus Threat Actor Compromises Widely Used Axios
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/04/03
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_ip:
        dst_ip:
            - '142.11.206.73'
            - '23.254.167.216'
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*packages.npm.org*'
            - '*plain-crypto-js-4.2.1.tgz*'
            - '*proton.me*'
            - '*setup.js*'
            - '*sfrclak.com*'
            - '*system.bat*'
            - '*t.rename*'
            - '*t.unlink*'
    condition: selection_ip or selection_dns
level: high
